channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Al Jazeera reporter sees destruction in Tehran neighbourhood
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Tohid Asadi shows the aftermath of US-Israeli airstrikes on a residential neighbourhood in Iran.

item.title: What we know about Iran and Hezbollah’s joint attacks on Israel
item.description: Iran has confirmed it has carried out coordinated attacks with Hezbollah against Israel.

item.title: Massive destruction after Israeli strikes in Beirut neighbourhood
item.description: Rubble from damaged buildings fills streets in southern Beirut after Israeli bombing.

item.title: How Iran’s women footballers took asylum in Australia and what happens next
item.description: Al Jazeera breaks down the events surrounding the Iranian team – from the national anthem row to the players' escape.

item.title: At least 64 killed, dozens reported missing in Ethiopia landslides, floods
item.description: Authorities have said most of those who died were found buried in mud.

item.title: Air attack hits house in suburbs of Tel Aviv
item.description: Video shows a house in central Israel damaged by a rocket reportedly fired by Hezbollah.

item.title: The war of signals: How Russia and China help Iran see the battlefield
item.description: Electronic warfare and intelligence sharing are eroding decades of US-Israeli dominance in the Gulf.

item.title: Iran says it targets Israeli bases, accuses Israel of targeting hospitals
item.description: Missile alert alarms sound in Jerusalem as the Israeli military says it launches another round of 'wide-scale' strikes.

item.title: Saudi Arabia and UAE condemn Iranian attacks
item.description: Saudi and UAE ambassadors to the UN condemn Iranian attacks ahead of Security Council meeting.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 13 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Cyberattacks, tensions in the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices are deepening the global consequences of the war.
